matcher_value: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $available = [bool](Get-Command Get-NetLbfoTeam -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue); $teams = @(); if ($available) { $teams = @(Get-NetLbfoTeam | Select-Object Name, Status, TeamingMode, LoadBalancingAlgorithm) }; [pscustomobject]@{ get_net_lbfo_team_available = $available; team_count = @($teams).Count; teams = $teams } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 6
